name: Invoice automation
desc: Reconciliation with Pathao invoice. Automated invoice creation and matching in Zoho Books.

versions.notes: Initial build. Manual reconciliation flow mapped. Zoho Books API connection established.

name: Expense automation
desc: Automated expense logging and categorization in Zoho Books.

versions.notes: Launched. Automated categorization for all vendor payments. Integrated with Zoho Books expense module.

name: Master finance dashboard
desc: Unified financial KPI dashboard integrating Zoho Books and Google Sheets with Looker Studio.

versions.notes: Looker Studio dashboard live. Pulls from Zoho Books and Google Sheets. Covers revenue, COD, expenses.

name: Inventory management supertool
desc: Google Sheets/Zoho system with True Demand tracking (Column L), 20-day lead time reorder logic, and daily alerts.

versions.notes: Basic inventory tracking in Google Sheets. Manual stock level monitoring.
Added True Demand column (L). Filters out returned/cancelled orders for accurate demand.
20-day lead time reorder logic. Daily automated alerts when stock drops below threshold.

name: Customer support IP & call tracking
desc: IP number system with call recording, duration, and timestamp logging. No prior tracking existed.

versions.notes: Full call tracking launched. Logs IP, duration, timestamp, agent. Dashboard for support managers.

name: WhatsApp marketing integration
desc: WhatsApp Business API integration for broadcast campaigns and order notifications.

versions.notes: WhatsApp Business API connected. Basic message sending confirmed.
Broadcast template approved. Order notification trigger wired to OMS.

name: OMS to Zoho Books sync
desc: Sales order automation from order management system into Zoho Books.

versions.notes: Nuport API integration. Order fetch working.
Zoho Books sales order creation mapped. Line items syncing.
Partial delivery and exchange flows added. Error logging in place.

name: Meta Ads MCP connector
desc: Direct Meta Ads account connection to Claude for natural language campaign management.

name: WooCommerce MCP connector
desc: AI-native access to WooCommerce store for product, order, and inventory management via Claude.
